products_and_services: Electricity generation from gas, coal, and solar

leadership_signals.note: Named executives sourced only from official public sources including ACWA Power investor relations and press releases.

transformation: Portfolio transformation from conventional to renewable energy assets
Green hydrogen mega-project NEOM: NEOM Green Hydrogen Company joint venture
Digitalization of O&M through IoT sensor networks and predictive analytics
Transition to clean energy in line with Saudi Vision 2030 objectives
erp_implementations: SAP-based enterprise management system for project and asset lifecycle tracking
Integrated asset management platform across 13 countries of operation
ai_initiatives: Predictive maintenance AI for power plant asset optimization
AI-driven energy forecasting and dispatch optimization
Digital twin technology for water desalination plant management
supply_chain: Strategic partnerships with global EPC contractors (Samsung C&T, GS Energy)
Localised procurement under Saudi Vision 2030 IKTVA requirements
Long-term O&M contracts for supply chain stability
investments: USD 250 billion long-term investment pipeline in renewable energy globally
NEOM Green Hydrogen Company: USD 8.4 billion investment (world's largest green hydrogen project)
Investment in battery energy storage projects across Middle East and Africa
Shareholder: Saudi PIF (Public Investment Fund), ACWA Holding, and other institutional investors
expansions: Active projects in 13 countries including Saudi Arabia, UAE, Egypt, South Africa, Uzbekistan, Vietnam
New markets entry: Central Asia renewable energy expansion
Red Sea Project: solar and wind energy supply for the giga-project
Hail & Hajanah Wind Energy Project (400MW) - first utility-scale wind project in KSA
other: Listed on Saudi Stock Exchange (Tadawul) since 2021
Vision 2030 anchor company for Saudi Arabia's renewable energy target of 50% by 2030
